zh.Foix, Ariège, Occitanie, France: 法國奧其坦尼阿利艾福瓦
zh.Foix, Midi-Pyrénées, France: 法國奧其坦尼阿利艾福瓦
zh.lifeSummary: 當Felipa de Montcada於1171年出生在法國時，她的父親Ramón I de Montcada36歲，母親Ramona de Tornemira27歲。她於1189年與Raimond-Roger de Foix在法國結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1222年5月14日在她的家鄉享年51歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Felipa de Montcada于1171年出生在法国时，她的父亲Ramón I de Montcada36岁，母亲Ramona de Tornemira27岁。她于1189年与Raimond-Roger de Foix在法国结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1222年5月14日在她的家乡享年51岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Montcada
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Catalan: variant of Montcada, a habitational name from any of the places so named in Valencia and Catalonia.

nameMeanings.name: Felipa
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Philip
meanings: From the Greek name Philippos, meaning ‘lover of horses’, from philein ‘to love’ + hippos ‘horse’. This was popular in the classical period and since. It was the name of the father of Alexander the Great . It was also the name of one of Christ's apostles, of a deacon ordained by the apostles after the death of Christ, and of several other early saints. See also Philippa .

en.lifeSummary: When Felipa de Montcada was born in 1171, in France, her father, Ramón I de Montcada, was 36 and her mother, Ramona de Tornemira, was 27. She married Raimond-Roger de Foix in 1189, in France. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 4 daughters. She died on 14 May 1222, in her hometown, at the age of 51.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Felipa de Montcada est née en 1171, à France, son père, Ramón I de Montcada, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Ramona de Tornemira, avait 27 ans. Elle a épousé Raimond-Roger de Foix en 1189, à France. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée le 14 mai 1222, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 51 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Felipa de Montcada 1171 in Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Ramón I de Montcada 36 und ihre Mutter Ramona de Tornemira 27. Sie hat 1189 in Frankreich Raimond-Roger de Foix geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb am 14. Mai 1222 im Alter von 51 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Felipa de Montcada è nata il nel 1171 nel Francia, sua padre, Ramón I de Montcada, aveva 36 anni e sua madre, Ramona de Tornemira, aveva 27 anni. Lei sposato Raimond-Roger de Foix nel 1189, nel Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 4 figlie. Morì il 14 maggio 1222, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 51 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Felipa de Montcadaが1171年にフランスで生まれた時，父Ramón I de Montcadaは36歳，母Ramona de Tornemiraは27歳であった。1189年にフランスでRaimond-Roger de Foixと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1222年5月14日に故郷で51歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Felipa de Montcada(이)가 1171년 프랑스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Ramón I de Montcada(은)는 36세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Ramona de Tornemira(은)는 27세였다. 그녀는 1189년 프랑스에서 Raimond-Roger de Foix(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1222년 5월 14일 그녀의 고향에서 51세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Felipa de Montcada nasceu em 1171, em França, seu pai, Ramón I de Montcada, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Ramona de Tornemira, tinha 27 anos. Ela casou-se com Raimond-Roger de Foix em 1189, em França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em 14 de maio de 1222, em sua cidade natal, com 51 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Felipa de Montcada родилась в 1171 г. в местности Франция, её отцу по имени Ramón I de Montcada было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Ramona de Tornemira, 27. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Raimond-Roger de Foix в 1189 г. в местности Франция. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 4 дочери. Она умерла 14 мая 1222 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 51 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Felipa de Montcada nació en 1171, en Francia, su papá, Ramón I de Montcada, tenía 36 años y su mamá, Ramona de Tornemira, tenía 27 años. Se casó con Raimond-Roger de Foix en 1189, en Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 14 de mayo de 1222, en su pueblo, a la edad de 51 años.
